description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a bold color scheme of black, red, and white. The upper part of the shoes is primarily black with red accents around the collar and heel, and a mesh-like gray section on the sides for breathability. The laces are red and white, threaded through metal eyelets, and the tongue displays a prominent logo patch. The midsole is white, contrasting with the black toe and heel, and there is a visible signature detail on the outer side of the shoe. The overall design suggests a modern, sporty aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, low-top athletic sneakers in black, red, and white with mesh side panels, signature detail, and a prominent logo on the tongue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded black toe caps, red collars, and logo patches on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mesh side panels, signature detail, and the red and white laces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red heel sections and the inner lining of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the mesh panel, signature, and the layered construction of the upper.
attribute_logo: A circular logo with a white and red motif is visible on the tongue of each shoe.
